payload.tactic: while (={i} /\ c{1} = c{2} /\ n{1} = n0 /\ n{2} = n0 /\ size p{1} = size p{2} /\ 1 <= i{1} /\ size c{1} + size p{1} <= max_cipher_size /\ (p{1} <> [] => size c{1} = block_size * (i{1} - 1)) /\ (forall (cc : C.counter), (n0, cc) \in ROF.m{1} => C.toint cc < i{1}) /\ (forall (nn : nonce) (cc : C.counter), (nn, cc) \in ROF.m{1} => nn \in n0 :: BNR.lenc{1}) /\ mr0 = ROin.m{1} /\ ms0 = ROout.m{1}).
